name: Pignoli Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Almond paste, canned; cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Line a cookie sheet with foil, parchment, or heavy brown paper.
Place pine nuts in a shallow dish.
In a medium bowl, beat almond paste, sugar, egg whites, and lemon peel with an electric mixer until smooth.
Using slightly wet hands, form the dough into 1-inch balls, using about a heaping teaspoon for each.
Press the balls onto the pine nuts, flattening them slightly and coating one side.
Place the cookies 1 inch apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
Bake for 22-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Cool completely on the cookie sheet or rack.
Store tightly covered for up to 2 weeks.
